setting.label: Prevent screensaver during playback
setting.help: Keeps the now-playing widget visible instead of letting Kodi's screensaver kick in while a station is playing.

setting.label: Sync now-playing display to actual audio
setting.help: Delays the title, artwork and progress bar so they change when the audio itself changes, instead of when Rainwave reports it -- compensates for the stream's own buffering delay.

setting.label: Stream buffer delay (seconds)
setting.help: How far behind Rainwave's reported now-playing the actual audio arrives. Increase if the title/artwork still change before you hear the new song; decrease if they change after. 15-20 is typical.

setting.label: Show picture slideshow behind Now Playing
Background source
setting.help: Local folder: shuffle through your own pictures, unrelated to what's playing. Automatic: fetch each game's own art from SteamGridDB and switch to it as that game plays.

setting.label: Picture folder
setting.help: Used as the picture source in Local folder mode. In Automatic mode, used as a fallback whenever no game art has been found yet (or at all) for the current song -- optional there, but avoids a blank background in the meantime.

setting.label: SteamGridDB API key
setting.help: Free -- generate one at steamgriddb.com/profile/preferences/api after creating an account. Required for automatic background art; nothing is fetched without it.

setting.label: Art cache size limit (MB)
setting.help: Fetched game art is kept permanently so it doesn't need re-downloading -- once this limit is reached, the least recently shown games' art is deleted first to make room. 0 = unlimited.

setting.label: Clear art cache
setting.help: Deletes every downloaded background image and starts fresh. Asks for confirmation first.
